title: Star Fox 64 Voice Actor Jock Blaney Dies
content: Blaney was born in Morristown, New Jersey on June 21, 1949. He is survived by his brother Robert Mills, daughter Brandi Phillips (Dwayne), three grandsons, niece, and many close friends. Blaney voiced Wolf O'Donnell, Bill Grey, and Granga in the 1997 Star Fox 64 game for Nintendo 64.
author: ANN

title: Love The Apothecary Diaries? This New Summer 2026 Anime Could Be For You
content: If you are craving more of the historical drama and intrigue seen in The Apothecary Diaries , there’s a new anime coming later this Summer that you’re going to want to check out.
author: ComicBook

title: Is Kagurabachi Finally Getting an Anime? Breaking Down the Rumors
content: Shonen Jump has a lot of new anime coming our way this year, but is Kagurabachi going to be the next in line as rumors might be suggesting? Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump has kicked off its next wave of new anime releases this year with a number of their franchises finally making their anime adaptation debuts .
author: ComicBook

title: All You Need Is Kill Anime Film Ships on Blu-ray Disc on July 7
content: GKIDS announced on Wednesday that Warner Bros. Japan and STUDIO4°C 's anime of Hiroshi Sakurazaka and Yoshitoshi ABe 's All You Need Is Kill science fiction light novel has launched digitally for rental or purchase, and it will ship on Blu-ray Disc on July 7 with distribution by Shout! Studios .
author: ANN

title: 'Do You Like Big Girls?' Anime Gets English Dub
content: The English dub stars: • Adam Curley as Sota • Leah Booth as Ayano • Angel Haven Rey as Kaoru • Brittany Juilfs as Sanae • Alexandria Loverro as Sakura • Mana T. Johnson as Kyoka • Meredith Nu as Julia The anime debuted first on AnimeFesta , which will stream both the "Premium Version" and the "On-Air Version"…
author: ANN

title: After 2 Years, A Crunchyroll Hidden Gem Isekai Confirms Season 3 Release Window
content: One of Crunchyroll’ s more underrated Isekai anime releases is coming back for new episodes after a two year wait, and has confirmed its release window with a new trailer and poster showing it all off.
author: ComicBook

title: The Amazing Digital Circus Fans Protest Theatrical Release, With Creator Releasing Official Statement
content: Fathom Events has long been creating cinematic events for pop culture fans, not just by bringing live-streamed events and classic films to the silver screen, but also by giving a platform to fan-favorite properties.
author: ComicBook

title: Crunchyroll to Stream Though I Am an Inept Villainess Anime
content: Crunchyroll announced on Wednesday that it will stream the television anime of Satsuki Nakamura 's Though I Am an Inept Villainess ( Futsutsuka na Akujo de wa Gozaimasu ga - Sūgū Chōso Torikae Den ) light novel series for the summer 2026 season, starting in July in North America, Central America, South America,…
author: ANN

title: One Piece Episode 1158 Trailer Sets Up New Sun God Mystery
content: One Piece is now in full effect with the Elbaph Arc of the anime this Spring , and the trailer for the next episode of the series is setting up a new Sun God reveal. One Piece has returned this April with a new season of the anime adapting the long awaited Elbaph Arc from Eiichiro Oda’s original manga series.
author: ComicBook

title: Exit 8 Live-Action Film Opens at #8 in U.S., Earns US$1,404,500
content: Exit 8 earned an estimated US$1,404,500 in its first three days. It earned an estimated US$570,000 Friday, US$484,500 on Saturday, and US$350,000 on Sunday. Film distribution company NEON (Oscar-winning films Parasite, Anora U.S. distributor) began screening the film in North America on Friday.
author: ANN
